allow: Bash(# Try the GeoFA SQL API to find cycling-related layers curl -s ""https://geofa.geodanmark.dk/api/v2/database/search?search=cykel&limit=20"")
Bash(# Try the GeoFA SQL API with proper parameters curl -s ""https://geofa.geodanmark.dk/api/v2/database/search?q=cykel&limit=20"")
Bash(# Check the vejman.dk WFS endpoint from Spatineo curl -s ""https://mapcache.vejman.dk/geoserver/wfs?service=WFS&version=1.0.0&request=GetCapabilities"")
Bash(# Check GeoFA for cycling route data - try the SQL API curl -s ""https://geofa.geodanmark.dk/api/v2/sql/fkg?q=SELECT%20DISTINCT%20tema%20FROM%20t_5800_fac_pkt%20LIMIT%2020"")

Bash(# List available GeoFA tables curl -s ""https://geofa.geodanmark.dk/api/v2/sql/fkg?q=SELECT%20table_name%20FROM%20information_schema.tables%20WHERE%20table_schema=''fkg''%20ORDER%20BY%20table_name"")
Bash(# Try different SQL approach for GeoFA curl -s ""https://geofa.geodanmark.dk/api/v2/sql/fkg?q=SELECT%20tablename%20FROM%20pg_tables%20WHERE%20schemaname=''public''%20LIMIT%2050"")
